creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri May 10 14:43:10 2013
New Revision: 317817
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317817

Log:
  - Update to 0.8.8
  
  PR:		177811
  Submitted by:	Christer Edwards <christer.edwards@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/py-django-photologue/Makefile
  head/www/py-django-photologue/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-django-photologue/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-django-photologue/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/py-django-photologue/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-photologue/Makefile	Fri May 10 14:40:33 2013	(r317816)
+++ head/www/py-django-photologue/Makefile	Fri May 10 14:43:10 2013	(r317817)
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	django-photologue
-PORTVERSION=	2.2
+PORTVERSION=	2.5
 CATEGORIES=	www python
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@caomhin.org
@@ -16,12 +16,11 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/django
 	${LOCALBASE}/bin/pildriver.py:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/py-imaging
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 USE_ZIP=	yes
 
-DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/py-${PORTNAME}
-
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=		TAGGING DOCS
+OPTIONSFILE= ${PORT_DBDIR}/py-${PORTNAME}/options
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=		TAGGING
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	TAGGING
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
@@ -30,10 +29,4 @@ OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	TAGGING
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/tagging/models.py:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-django-tagging
 .endif
 
-post-install:
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README.txt ${DOCSDIR}
-.endif
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

+++ head/www/py-django-photologue/pkg-descr	Fri May 10 14:43:10 2013	(r317817)
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@ solution. Effects, include reflections a
 embraces the Django admin and smoothly integrates with photo thumbnails and
 effect previews.
 
-WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/django-photologue/
+WWW: https://github.com/jdriscoll/django-photologue
